examples: I'm going to guard the Queen and stand outside the palace in my tunic.
He is a 37-year-old man with the distinct Mongolian features characteristic of the borderlands, and he wears a brown tunic, a turban, and a tentative smile.
If someone wants to Sue you and take your tunic, let him have your cloak as well.
He wore a filthy tunic, with a piece of rope as a belt, and no shoes.
The head is covered with a cap of the same colour as the tunic.
